texto: True Christian Living is the willingness to deny yourself and consider pleasing God and obedience to Him to be your highest calling in life no matter what station you are in. The things that you do in secret for God will be of more value in His Sight then the pleasures of this world and doing what people think you should do.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Anya vonderLuft sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “True Christian Living is the willingness to deny yourself and consider pleasing God and obedience…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, spiritual-growth, spiritual-growth-self-denial, útil em momentos de spiritual-growth-self-denial.

texto: Life is not worth living unless you live it for the One who gave you life.
explicacao: Citação de Anya vonderLuft sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Life is not worth living unless you live it for the One who gave you life.” articula vida, spiritual-growth, reflexao em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Love is marked by the inward beauty of Christ in your heart and the way you treat others whether they are in your presence or not. A person who is showing Christ-like Love will not say bad things about others when they are not around. Instead they will seek to encourage them and build them up in the Lord at every opportunity.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anya vonderLuft: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Love is marked by the inward beauty of Christ in your heart and the way you treat others whether …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, spirituality, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
